_version: v2 — targeted improvements from screenshot analysis
_changes_from_base: BridgeDiffusionScheduler: starts from MWIR-derived prior, not pure noise
GlobalSceneContextEncoder: adds global thermal context to UNet
LinearMWIRtoLWIRPrior: auxiliary head trains alongside diffusion
_attn_note: 256px with 4 levels: 256→128→64→32→16→8. Attention at the two finest scales.

_loss_weights_rationale.lambda_cfc: 0.15 — raised from 0.10: primary fix for thermal homogenization
_loss_weights_rationale.lambda_spectral: 0.10 — raised from 0.05: fixes edge blurring on roads/buildings
_loss_weights_rationale.lambda_prior: 0.10 — NEW: trains the bridge prior network

_precision_note: float32 = numerically safe (recommended); bfloat16 = ~1.5x faster on A100 but has fft2/GroupNorm instabilities

_tuning_notes.if_training_unstable: Reduce lambda_gram first (Gram losses can spike early)
